questions.stem: <ruby>去年<rt>きょねん</rt></ruby>＿＿＿、<ruby>今年<rt>ことし</rt></ruby>は<ruby>雪<rt>ゆき</rt></ruby>が<ruby>少<rt>すく</rt></ruby>ない。
questions.why: A straight comparison of two measurable amounts. に対して would set up a contrast of stances, not quantities.

questions.stem: <ruby>東京<rt>とうきょう</rt></ruby>＿＿＿、この<ruby>町<rt>まち</rt></ruby>は<ruby>物価<rt>ぶっか</rt></ruby>が<ruby>安<rt>やす</rt></ruby>い。
questions.why: Tokyo is the yardstick the town is measured against.

questions.stem: <ruby>以前<rt>いぜん</rt></ruby>＿＿＿、<ruby>日本語<rt>にほんご</rt></ruby>がずいぶん<ruby>上手<rt>じょうず</rt></ruby>になった。
questions.why: Comparing your present self against your past self. につれて would need a parallel change ('as X progresses, Y does too').
